nasb.text: For to you it has been granted for Christ’s sake, not only to believe in Him, but also to suffer for His sake,

esv.text: For it has been granted to you that for the sake of Christ you should not only believe in him but also suffer for his sake,

cnv.text: 因為　神為了基督的緣故賜恩給你們，使你們不單是信基督，也是要為他受苦；

ccb.text: 因为上帝为了基督的缘故，赐恩使你们不但信基督，而且为祂受苦，

csbs.text: 原来你们为基督所蒙的恩是：不仅要信基督，而且还要为他受苦，
